steps.title: Notice the squared term becomes zero
Use the vertex shortcut
steps.content: The expression is written in vertex form. When the squared part is $0$, the whole $6(\cdots)^2$ term disappears, leaving only the constant term.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The value is 7/3, which is also about $2.333$. The chosen input makes the squared expression zero, so only the constant term remains.
